text:
CMS demonstrations were in effect at different times; the actual values will vary by year. 

0 = Non-Demonstration 
1 = Continuing Care Retirement Community (CCRC) Demo 
2 = ESRDII Demo 
3 = MA Health Senior Care Options 
4 = Minnesota Disability Health Options 
5 = Minnesota Senior Health Options 
6 = SHMO 
7 = SHMO II 
8 = Wisconsin Partnership Program 

Starting in 2011, there were only two valid values for this variable: 
0 = Non-Demonstration 
1 = Demonstration 

COMMENT: There are no Part
